stonetop.summary: A clumsy patchwork beast raised from boiled bones and blood, lurching to its maker's will.

system.concept: A clumsy patchwork beast raised from boiled bones and blood, lurching to its maker's will.
system.description: Boil the bones of beasts in a cauldron, stir in your own fresh blood, and an unliving chimera rises to serve you as a follower — a clumsy, confused patchwork of every beast whose bones you used (bear-like, owl-like, and so on), with a tag for each. Stabilize it with enough blood and effort, or it falls apart within a day. Its cost is lots of fresh blood.
